name: Tealwater
personality: Tealwater's @ eyes and propeller hat suggest a duck who learned to code by reading changelogs at 2x speed, generating wild new feature ideas before the last one ships. 'Take a breath' is simply not in Tealwater's vocabulary, nor is waiting for the build to finish.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
